comments.comment: Increase in landfill waste(101% of 2005)

type.fr: Commentaire sur l'élimination

comments.comment: Total leachate quantity increased 44% and average Ammonia concentration increased 20% from 2004.

type.fr: Commentaire sur l'élimination

comments.comment: Ammonia quantity in leachate previously viewed as micrograms/liter rather than miligrams/liter.

type.fr: Commentaire sur l'élimination

comments.comment: The amount of Asbestos disposed of varies annually based on the amount that is brought to the site. Quantity is of total asbestos since the site does not differentiate between total and friable asbestos.

type.fr: Commentaire sur l'élimination

comments.comment: There was more ammonia contained in the leachate in 2020.

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: Increase in road dust to more vehicle kilometers travelled. There was a larger exposed surface area in the stockpiles and there were more days with the wind over 19.3 km/hr. The mean vehicle weight was higher in 2020 than in 2019.

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: Increase in road dust due to more vehicle kilometers travelled and higher mean vehicle weight. There was more exposed surface on the piles and more days with winds over 19.3 km/hr.

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: The emission factor for particulate matter was updated to the emission factor for TPM in the Draft Section of the AP-42 Chapter 2.4  Municipal Solid Waste, Table 2.4-4 Emission Rates for Secondary Compounds exiting control devices.

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: More asbestos received in 2021.

type.fr: Commentaire sur l'élimination

comments.comment: The amount of Asbestos disposed of varies annually based on the amount that is brought to the site. Quantity is of total asbestos since the site does not differentiate between total and friable asbestos.

type.fr: Commentaire sur le recyclage

comments.comment: No recycling of this substance.

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: Less leachate collected in 2021.

type.fr: Commentaire sur l'élimination

comments.comment: There was less ammonia contained in the leachate in 2021.

type.fr: Commentaire sur le recyclage

comments.comment: No recycling of this substance.

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: Reduction in TPM because the road dust equation was updated to consider the effects of precipitation and snow, there were less vehicles on unpaved roads in 2021, and the vehicle traffic was updated to consider average weights of individual vehicle classes, additionally less cover material was handled.

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: There was a reduction in particulate matter because the road dust equation was updated to consider the effects of precipitation and snow, there were fewer vehicles on unpaved roads in 2021, and the vehicle traffic was updated to consider the average weights of individual vehicle classes.  Less cover material was handled.

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: Reduction in particulate matter because the road dust equation was updated to consider the effects of precipitation and snow, there were less vehicles on unpaved roads in 2021, and the vehicle traffic was updated to consider average weights of individual vehicle classes, additionally less cover material was handled.

type.fr: Commentaire sur l'élimination

comments.comment: The amount of Asbestos disposed of varies annually based on the amount that is brought to the site. Quantity is of total asbestos since the site does not differentiate between total and friable asbestos.

type.fr: Commentaire sur l'élimination

comments.comment: There was a lower average concentration of ammonia in the leachate in 2023.

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: More vehicles travelled on unpaved roads and more cover material was handled in 2023.

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: More vehicles travelled on unpaved roads and more material was handled in 2023.

type.fr: Commentaire sur l'élimination

comments.comment: Normal annual variation in landfilling activities.

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: The carbon monoxide emission factor for internal combustion engines was updated in AP-42 Chapter 2.4 in May 2025. The new emission factor is lower.

type.fr: Commentaire sur l'élimination

comments.comment: Normal annual variation in landfill usage.

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: More cover material was handled in 2024. The particulate emission factor for internal combustion engines was updated in AP-42, Chapter 2.4.

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: More cover material was handled in 2024. The particulate emission factor for internal combustion engines was updated in AP-42, Chapter 2.4.
